recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: Old People
recommendations.overview: A woman who's returned home with her two kids to attend her sister's wedding must suddenly defend their lives against older people on a killing spree.

recommendations.title: Anguish
recommendations.overview: An ophthalmologist's assistant with an unhealthy interest in human eyeballs goes on a killing spree to collect eyeballs for his overbearing mother's collection. Reality soon takes a bizarre turn, both for the characters and the audience.

recommendations.title: Nightmare
recommendations.overview: A drug-treated schizophrenic plagued by horrible nightmares is released from the hospital and goes on a killing spree.

recommendations.title: Out of the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple and their daughter moves to Colombia to take over a family manufacturing plant, only to realize their new home is haunted.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: After a young couple moves into a remote farmhouse with their infant son, the woman's struggles with postpartum psychosis begin to intensify... as the house reveals secrets of its own.

recommendations.title: He Was a Quiet Man
recommendations.overview: An unhinged office worker who planned to go on a shooting spree at his workplace struggles with his newfound status as a hero after he ends up stopping a shooting spree instead.

recommendations.title: Girl
recommendations.overview: A young woman returns to her small hometown intent on killing her abusive father only to discover someone murdered him the day before. As the girl searches for answers, she uncovers a family legacy more dangerous than she'd imagined.

recommendations.title: The Goldsmith
recommendations.overview: Determined to rob a goldsmith, three young robbers break into his country house. The man and his wife turn out to be less defenseless than they seem.

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
recommendations.overview: A young Greek woman falls in love with a non-Greek and struggles to get her family to accept him while she comes to terms with her heritage and cultural identity.
